recommendations.title: The Lonely Island Presents: The Unauthorized Bash Brothers Experience
recommendations.overview: The Lonely Island spoofs Jose Canseco and Mark McGwire in this visual rap album set in the Bash Brothers' 1980s heyday.

recommendations.title: The Watch

recommendations.title: Hot Rod

recommendations.title: Popstar: Never Stop Never Stopping
recommendations.overview: When his new album fails to sell records, pop/rap superstar Conner4real goes into a major tailspin and watches his celebrity high life begin to collapse. He'll try anything to bounce back, anything except reuniting with his old rap group The Style Bo

recommendations.title: Chip 'n Dale: Rescue Rangers

recommendations.title: Detective Chinatown
recommendations.overview: After being rejected from the police college, a mannerly man travels to Bangkok where he and an energetic distant relative must solve a murder case.

recommendations.title: Léon: The Professional

recommendations.title: Sand Castle
recommendations.overview: Set during the occupation of Iraq, a squad of U.S. soldiers try to protect a small village.

recommendations.title: RE:BORN
recommendations.overview: A former special forces operative struggling to contain the destructive impulses of his past goes on a rampage against a squad of ruthless assassins.
